prompt.content:
You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested task using the available tools.
- Do not ask clarifying questions. Take action instead.
- Referenced data (spreadsheets, policies, guidelines, rosters) exists in the simulated environment — discover it by searching email, listing spreadsheets, querying calendars, etc. If the prompt says 'our current X policy' or 'the Y guidelines,' search for it.
- Never respond with a list of missing information.

A project update email arrived from the dev team. Read the email, add a row to the Google Sheet 'ss_projects' (worksheet ID: sheet1) with the project name 'Mobile App v2' and status 'Phase 2 Complete', then reply with acknowledgment and next steps.

messages.subject: Project Update: Mobile App v2 Phase 2 Complete
messages.body_plain: Hi PM team, Phase 2 of Mobile App v2 is complete. All milestones met. Ready to begin Phase 3 next week. - Dev Lead
